reason_for_update: Promotes the composed client-side contract object that contains Metadata Injector, Timestamp Stabilizer, Validator when applicable, and envelope assembly routine.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope Assembler must not be collapsed into raw Level API, generic preparation layer, or runtime queue object.
notes: It is the client-side contract composition object before server-side admission.

reason_for_update: Introduces the server-side receiving/admission port for Log Level Envelope entry into the assembler subsystem.
anti_collapse_rule: Assembler Ingress Port receives Log Level Envelope; it must not accept raw content as final runtime carrier.
notes: Separates client-side Envelope Assembler from server-side assembler ingress surface.

reason_for_update: Introduces the administrative/ecosystem port for policy bundles, metadata directives, and operational directives.
anti_collapse_rule: Administrative / Ecosystem Port must not collapse into consuming content ingress or managerial execution surface.
notes: Preserves administrative path for ecosystem/control inputs.

reason_for_update: Introduces the outbound registry-facing contract surface without replacing Dispatcher as actor.
anti_collapse_rule: Registry / Delivery Port is a contract surface; Dispatcher remains final assembler-side handoff actor.
notes: Closes registry abstraction without importing registry internals.

reason_for_update: Promotes the Log Level Envelope as authoritative runtime carrier containing accepted content, metadata, and stabilized timestamp.
anti_collapse_rule: Log Level Envelope must not be replaced by raw content and must not be treated as queue-container identity.
notes: Carrier identity and queue-container occupancy are separate.

reason_for_update: Introduces compact delivery-cycle flags as state updates after delivery-cycle outcomes.
anti_collapse_rule: Delivery-Cycle Flag Set must not be conflated with Dispatcher Feedback Report.
notes: Expanded into seven sub-responsibilities RSP-CAN-025.1 through RSP-CAN-025.7.

reason_for_update: Introduces detailed dispatcher feedback reports as diagnostic/reporting artifacts separate from compact delivery-cycle flags.
anti_collapse_rule: Dispatcher Feedback Report must not be conflated with Delivery-Cycle Flag Set.
notes: Expanded into five sub-responsibilities RSP-CAN-048.1 through RSP-CAN-048.5.

reason_for_update: Corrects prior use of Queue Runtime Layer as a possible delegation target; actual runtime carriers are Queue Bundle Agent, Single Queue Moderator, and round managers.
anti_collapse_rule: QUEUE-RUNTIME-LAYER must never appear as primary delegated entity or primary enforcing entity.

reason_for_update: Clarifies that Metadata Injector applies metadata schema/directives and does not require or host Policy Object mechanism semantics.
anti_collapse_rule: Metadata Injector must not be assigned EN-FAM-002 and must not become a policy-consuming component.
notes: It remains governed by metadata schema/directive semantics.

reason_for_update: Corrects runtime terminology so the queue itself is the container; no separate runtime container exists above queue.
anti_collapse_rule: No separate runtime container may be introduced above Queue Container.
notes: This is a doctrine-level taxonomy correction.

reason_for_update: Promotes Queue Container Identifier as the locator stored in writing and delivery waiting lists.
anti_collapse_rule: Queue Container Identifier locates queue-container only and must not be treated as Log Level Envelope identity.

reason_for_update: Clarifies that envelope slot occupancy is a binding/state artifact and not lifecycle ownership.
anti_collapse_rule: Envelope Slot Occupancy must not imply Log Level Envelope lifecycle ownership.
notes: Lifecycle transfer remains governed by dispatcher-registry handoff.

reason_for_update: Adds observability as a derived surface for dispatcher feedback reports and future diagnostic consumers.
anti_collapse_rule: Observability surface must not replace managerial responsibility or delivery-cycle state flags.
notes: Used for reports, diagnostics, and optional future consumers.

new_status: two canonical artifacts and two sub-responsibility groups
reason_for_update: Splits dispatcher feedback into compact delivery-cycle flags and detailed dispatcher feedback reports.
anti_collapse_rule: BCO-013 and BCO-014 must remain distinct governed objects.
notes: This update is the taxonomy-level expression of G-003 closure.

reason_for_update: Replaces generic contract layer language with concrete Envelope Assembler, Assembler Ingress Port, Administrative / Ecosystem Port, and Registry / Delivery Port.
anti_collapse_rule: Contract surfaces are typed/template and port-based; they must not become runtime COM interfaces.
notes: This update enables clean ontology relations between contracts, ports, and responsibilities.

reason_for_update: Defines responsibility-to-obligation-to-entity trace as a future ontology relation family.
anti_collapse_rule: Trace relation must preserve direction: contract derives responsibility; responsibility maps to obligation; obligation is enforced by entity.
notes: Foundation for Assembler System Ontology Expert Skill.
